scenario: Learner doing reading or report writing.
script_for_bot: Let's chunk your report. Step 1: Write the purpose in one sentence: 'The goal of this experiment was...'. Step 2: List 3 things you did. Step 3: Note one result. We'll expand later. For reading, take one paragraph, summarize it in two sentences—send it to me if stuck.
rationale: Structured scaffolds reduce cognitive load and improve working-memory efficiency for ADHD learners.
source: Boone et al. (2020) Academic Coaching for Students with ADHD; WHO Digital Learning Accessibility Guidelines (2022)
